nodes.label: Israel-Iran War
nodes.summary: The conflict between Israel and Iran, known as Epic Fury, enters its second week as of March 7, 2026.

props.content: Israel-Iran war enters day 8 with intensifying strikes and retaliations.

nodes.label: Tehran Air Strikes
nodes.summary: Israel launched strikes involving 80 jets hitting military sites near Tehran's Mehrabad Airport on March 7, 2026.

props.content: 80 Israeli jets targeted military sites near Mehrabad Airport; Iran retaliated with missiles and drones.

nodes.label: Donald Trump
nodes.summary: President of the United States in 2026.

nodes.label: Unconditional Surrender Demand
nodes.summary: The Trump administration has demanded the unconditional surrender of Iran, mirroring WWII rhetoric.

props.decision_rationale: Intended to force regime change in Iran.

nodes.label: Iran Regime Change
nodes.summary: The strategic objective of forcing a change in the Iranian government.

nodes.label: Post-War Planning Absence
nodes.summary: FT reports the Trump administration lacks aftermath planning for Iran, increasing the risk of a power vacuum.

nodes.label: PLA Command Vacuum
nodes.summary: A significant leadership gap in the Chinese People's Liberation Army with 71% of CMC positions vacant.

nodes.label: CMC Vacancy Data
nodes.summary: Quantitative analysis showing 71% of Central Military Commission positions are vacant following purges.

nodes.label: Taiwan Invasion Implausibility
nodes.summary: Major PLA operations, including a Taiwan invasion, are considered mechanically implausible due to command chain collapse.

props.content: PLA command vacuum makes Taiwan invasion mechanically implausible in the near term.

nodes.label: Xi Jinping
nodes.summary: Leader of China who initiated purges within the military leadership.

nodes.label: Keir Starmer
nodes.summary: UK Prime Minister facing a leadership crisis in March 2026.

nodes.label: Gorton By-election
nodes.summary: Labour fell to third place in the Gorton by-election, behind the Greens and Reform.

props.content: Labour Party defeat in Gorton by-election described as an 'earthquake'.

nodes.label: Starmer Resignation Refusal
nodes.summary: Keir Starmer signals he will not resign despite the Gorton by-election defeat.

props.decision_rationale: Preventing a leadership vacuum during the Middle East crisis.

nodes.label: May 2026 Local Elections

props.description: UK local elections serving as a critical test for the Labour government.
